title: huwm #1949
definition:
1) to distract, ring again, make a (great) noise, murmur, roar,
    discomfit, be moved
    1a) (Qal) to discomfit
    1b) (Niphal) to be in a stir
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to murmur
        1c2) to show disquietude
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to distract, ring again, make a (great) noise, murmur, roar,
    discomfit, be moved
    1a) (Qal) to discomfit
    1b) (Niphal) to be in a stir
    1c) (Hiphil)
        1c1) to murmur
        1c2) to show disquietude

    NASB:  to murmur, roar, defeat in battle
